title: Skip Navigation Link
description:
Build a **skip navigation** component that lets keyboard users bypass the navigation and jump straight to the main content.

### Requirements

- A visually hidden link that says "Skip to main content"
- The link becomes visible when it receives focus (keyboard Tab)
- Clicking the link moves focus to the `<main>` element (identified by `id="main-content"`)
- The skip link is the first focusable element on the page
- When visible, the link is styled as a fixed banner at the top of the viewport
- After clicking, the main element receives focus (use `tabIndex="-1"` on `<main>`)

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Skip link | `skip-link` |
| Nav | `nav` |
| Main content | `main-content` |
constraints:
- The skip link must be hidden from sighted users until focused
- Must use proper HTML semantics (anchor element with href)
- The link must function with keyboard-only navigation
- Do not use display:none or visibility:hidden (screen readers must still access it)
hints: Use the 'visually hidden' CSS pattern: position absolute, clip, overflow hidden. Then undo it on :focus.
Set href='#main-content' and add id='main-content' to the <main> element with tabIndex={-1}.
In the onClick handler, call document.getElementById('main-content')?.focus() for reliable focus management.
